title: Pancake Paradise
description: A simple mod adding pancakes and maple syrup to the game.
body:
Pancake Paradise is a simple mod that adds pancakes and maple syrup.

## Maple Syrup

![A maple tap block on a maple tree.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KfUFthvm/images/0699e5c97824315e674d0cbb363ca04ea7a6df70.webp)

The maple tap block works on spruce and red maple (From BYG) trees. It takes a few minutes to collect maple sap, which can then be harvested with a glass bottle.

  ![A crafting recipie showing an iron bar at the top center, chains in the center, and barrel in the bottom center making the maple tap.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfae2a1c92873022150fb20e0f603539de8d7d58.png)

To craft maple syrup, simply add sugar to the maple sap.  

  ![A shapeless crafting recipie showing maple sap and sugar resulting in maple syrup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b05f722a8c692d7d7a6da9715e4a38288523bccc.png)
  

## Pancakes

![A player standing in front of podiums with the three pancakes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KfUFthvm/images/362b46a12176c3db6e90dfba2a4b4c0b164b6fa9.png)
Three types of pancakes can currently be crafted: Plain Pancakes, Classic Pancakes and Sweet Pancakes.
      
 
![A crafting recipie showing wheat on all of the left and right collumns, sugar on the top center, an egg on the center, and milk on the bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb51066ce75e6713e1e9c6b55272cfc3e26b192.png)
 
![A shapeless recipie showing maple syrup, plain pancakes, and milk resulting in classic pancakes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c5d262282ecd03d2d2954423fc977a6ad0f5f66.png)

![A shapeless recipie, where plain pancakes, maple syrup, milk, sugar, berries, and cocoa beans result in sweet pancakes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5f52fe2420a68a4c3ce22ccb07f9da9bf64f956.png)
